languages.text: "Камилла Драйвстем, герцогиня Даргонуса. Вы что-то хотели?" {n}Пожилая дама, поймавшая ваш взгляд, держится спокойнее прочих. Ее костлявые пальцы мерно перебирают драгоценные четки.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Камилла Драйвстем, герцогиня Даргонуса. Вы что-то хотели?" {n}Пожилая дама, поймавшая ваш взгляд, держится спокойнее прочих. Ее костлявые пальцы мерно перебирают драгоценные чётки.{/n}

languages.text: "Camilla Drivestem, Duchess of Dargonus. Is there something you need?" {n}The elderly lady who catches your eye is more sanguine than the rest. Her bony fingers steadily work through a string of jewelled prayer beads.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Камилла Драйвстем, герцогиня Даргонуса. Вы что-то хотели?" {n}Пожилая дама, поймавшая ваш взгляд, держится спокойнее прочих. Ее костлявые пальцы мерно перебирают драгоценные четки.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Camilla Drivestem, Duchess of Dargonus. Is there something you need?" {n}The elderly lady who catches your eye is more sanguine than the rest. Her bony fingers steadily work through a string of jewelled prayer beads.{/n}

"Camilla Drivestem, Duchess of Dargonus. Is there something you need?" {n}The elderly lady who catches your eye is more sanguine than the rest. Her bony fingers steadily work through a string of jewelled prayer beads.{/n}

"Camilla Drivestem, Duchess of Dargonus. Is there something you need?" {n}The elderly lady who catches your eye is more sanguine than the rest. Her bony fingers steadily work through a string of jewelled prayer beads.{/n}

languages.text: “我是达戈努斯女爵，卡米拉·德莱夫斯塔。你找我有什么事吗？”{n}这位引起你注意的老妇人比旁人更显从容。她枯瘦的手指不紧不慢地拨弄着一串镶有宝石的念珠。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Camilla Drivestem, Duchess of Dargonus. Is there something you need?" {n}The elderly lady who catches your eye is more sanguine than the rest. Her bony fingers steadily work through a string of jewelled prayer beads.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我是达戈努斯女爵，卡米拉·德莱夫斯塔。你找我有什么事吗？”{n}这位引起你注意的老妇人比旁人更显从容。她枯瘦的手指不紧不慢地拨弄着一串镶有宝石的念珠。{/n}

languages.text: « Camilla Drivestem, duchesse de Dargonus. Que puis-je faire pour vous ? » {n}La femme âgée qui attire votre attention semble plus empressée que les autres. Elle continue d'égrener son chapelet de ses doigts osseux en attendant votre réponse.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Camilla Drivestem, Duchess of Dargonus. Is there something you need?" {n}The elderly lady who catches your eye is more sanguine than the rest. Her bony fingers steadily work through a string of jewelled prayer beads.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Camilla Drivestem, duchesse de Dargonus. Que puis-je faire pour vous ? » {n}La femme âgée qui attire votre attention semble plus empressée que les autres. Elle continue d'égrener son chapelet de ses doigts osseux en attendant votre réponse.{/n}

languages.text: "Camilla Drivestem, Dargonus Düşesi. Bir şeye mi ihtiyacınız var?" {n}Gözüne çarpan yaşlı hanımefendi, diğerlerinden daha iyimser duruyor. Kemikli parmakları, mücevherli bir tespihi düzenli bir şekilde çekiyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Camilla Drivestem, Duchess of Dargonus. Is there something you need?" {n}The elderly lady who catches your eye is more sanguine than the rest. Her bony fingers steadily work through a string of jewelled prayer beads.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Camilla Drivestem, Dargonus Düşesi. Bir şeye mi ihtiyacınız var?" {n}Gözüne çarpan yaşlı hanımefendi, diğerlerinden daha iyimser duruyor. Kemikli parmakları, mücevherli bir tespihi düzenli bir şekilde çekiyor.{/n}

languages.text: «Camilla Drivestem, duquesa de Dargonus. ¿Necesita algo?». {n}La anciana que llama tu atención parece más optimista que el resto de los presentes. Sus huesudos dedos recorren constantemente una cadena de cuentas de oración enjoyadas.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Camilla Drivestem, Duchess of Dargonus. Is there something you need?" {n}The elderly lady who catches your eye is more sanguine than the rest. Her bony fingers steadily work through a string of jewelled prayer beads.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Camilla Drivestem, duquesa de Dargonus. ¿Necesita algo?». {n}La anciana que llama tu atención parece más optimista que el resto de los presentes. Sus huesudos dedos recorren constantemente una cadena de cuentas de oración enjoyadas.{/n}

languages.text: "Camilla Drivestem, Herzogin von Dargonus. Braucht Ihr etwas?" {n}Die betagte Dame, die deine Aufmerksamkeit weckt, ist lebendiger als der Rest. Ihre knochigen Finger spielen mit den juwelenbesetzten Perlen einer Gebetskette.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Camilla Drivestem, Duchess of Dargonus. Is there something you need?" {n}The elderly lady who catches your eye is more sanguine than the rest. Her bony fingers steadily work through a string of jewelled prayer beads.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Camilla Drivestem, Herzogin von Dargonus. Braucht Ihr etwas?" {n}Die betagte Dame, die deine Aufmerksamkeit weckt, ist lebendiger als der Rest. Ihre knochigen Finger spielen mit den juwelenbesetzten Perlen einer Gebetskette.{/n}

languages.text: 「カミラ・ドライブスィム、ドラゴンスの公爵夫人。何か用ですか？」{n}目を引く年配の女性は、他の女性よりも元気です。骨の透き通った指は、宝石のついた祈りの珠をゆっくりと動かし続けています。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Camilla Drivestem, Duchess of Dargonus. Is there something you need?" {n}The elderly lady who catches your eye is more sanguine than the rest. Her bony fingers steadily work through a string of jewelled prayer beads.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「カミラ・ドライブスィム、ドラゴンスの公爵夫人。何か用ですか？」{n}目を引く年配の女性は、他の女性よりも元気です。骨の透き通った指は、宝石のついた祈りの珠をゆっくりと動かし続けています。{/n}
